message:
fix: resolve borrow conflict in OwnedAcquireFuture and apply rustfmt formatting

Clone Arc before locking to break borrow conflict between self.semaphore
and self.waiter_id in the OwnedAcquireFuture poll implementation. Also
apply rustfmt across circuit_breaker, rate_limit, barrier, and semaphore
modules — fix indentation alignment, trailing whitespace, and struct
literal formatting for multi-field variants.

- semaphore: clone Arc<Semaphore> before lock to avoid simultaneous
  borrow of self.semaphore and self.waiter_id
- barrier: expand WaitState::Waiting struct literals to multi-line form
- circuit_breaker: fix indentation and line-wrap on long atomic store
- rate_limit: remove trailing whitespace on blank lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
